top_signals.title: America’s ailing one-trick pony
top_signals.summary: Trump’s excessive faith in military power is squarely within the US tradition
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan, South Korea Deepen Ties Amid Global Tensions
top_signals.summary:
Japan’s Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and South Korean President Lee Jae Myung pledged closer cooperation on energy and security, while strengthening ties with other allies as geopolitical tensions continue to rise.

 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Oxford-Cambridge Growth Corridor Investment Prospectus
top_signals.summary: The Investment Prospectus sets out some of the investment opportunities that make the Corridor and the UK a dynamic and exciting place to invest.

top_signals.title: ISIS leader killed in Africa as US commander raises force reduction concerns
top_signals.summary: Despite recent operations, U.S. force reduction moves have ignited concerns over America's ability to stifle terror plots emanating from the continent.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Venionaire Capital Mandated to Structure KISAB’s Next Growth Round
top_signals.summary: Growth round to target growth private equity and strategic investors as KISAB advances its 8-inch BPD-free SiC wafer platform
